headline: Honeywell Announces Board of Directors for Honeywell Aerospace
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced the anticipated Board of Directors for Honeywell Aerospace, which will be one of the largest publicly listed pure-play aerospace and defense companies following its planned spin-off from Honeywell.
